source_jobs.title: Senior Content Marketer
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Senior Content Marketer?

Dapper is looking for a Senior Content Marketer with a pioneering spirit. You’ll play a key role in helping our clients drive online growth, from strategy to execution. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful.



This job is for you if you:

 - Have 6 years of relevant experience, ideally in a B2B context, fast scaling, or agency environment (or you are open to adapt fast to a new environment)

 - You bring strategic content marketing skills, meaning you know how to create ICPs, content messaging frameworks, host the workshops needed and bring that together in a realistic strategy with roadmap that you keep tracking for continuous improvement. However, you still enjoy jumping into the details, whether challenging content creation, writing long and short form copy, reviewing ad copies or sparring with your clients on content strategy and value-proposition

 - Do the deep research needed to make sure you get to the bottom of the needs and wishes of the client, which you can translate into concrete content ideas that stand out (scripts and concepts for video and visuals, infographics, thought leadership posts, blogs, copy for landing pages, ads, etc.)

 - You can connect your writing skills to design execution (visual thinker) to make sure the copy and design are complementing each other (no worries, our creative team does the design work)

 - Share knowledge proactively. Something you're particularly proud of? Take your team along in your thought process. Together we learn and grow

 - Guide juniors/mediors with clear and practical feedback and guidance so that they learn and grow into becoming the best content marketers

 - You bring a growth mindset, open to feedback, focused on learning, and always looking for ways to improve and support others in doing the same.

 - Take full ownership of your projects, challenging the brief, aligning with clients, and pushing for better outcomes through collaboration with the team

 - Are confident owning and leading client relationships, from onboarding and strategy to reviews and roadmap planning
   
   

What we value in everyone at Dapper

Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:

 - You communicate clearly and proactively in Dutch and English.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change, you adapt without losing momentum, and you find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact, you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity, you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.



A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

At Dapper, we not only help our clients to grow but also ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. We get the job done and celebrate afterwards.

 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies

 - Receive training from the leading B2B Marketing experts

 - 30 vacation days per year

 - Participation in our retirement plan (plus a 5% monthly contribution on top of your salary at Nationale Nederlanden)

 - 8% holiday allowance

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - Complimentary breakfast and lunch

 - Travel costs covered

 - Complimentary Macbook

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team

 - Office next to Rotterdam Central Station

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - Team activities throughout the year

 - You’re welcomed into a positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key



Who are we?

Dapper i

source_jobs.title: Senior Performance Marketer
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Senior Performance Marketer?

Dapper is looking for a Senior Performance Marketer with a pioneering spirit - someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency worldwide.

As a Senior Performance Marketer, you’ll play a key role in helping our clients drive online growth, from strategy to execution. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful.



This job is for you if you:

 - Have 5+ years of relevant experience, ideally in a B2B context, fast scaling, or agency environment.

 - You bring a growth mindset, open to feedback, focused on learning, and always looking for ways to improve and support others in doing the same.

 - Bring a strategic mindset, but still enjoy jumping into the details, whether it’s presenting a paid strategy for a client or deep diving into the analytics.

 - Take full ownership of your projects, challenging the brief, aligning with clients, and pushing for better outcomes through collaboration with the team.

 - Are confident owning and leading client relationships, from onboarding and strategy to reviews and roadmap planning.
   
   

What we value in everyone at Dapper

Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:

 - You communicate clearly and proactively in English, whether it’s with teammates, clients, or through your work, you keep things sharp, structured, and on point.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change, you adapt without losing momentum, and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact, you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity, you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.
   
   

A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

At Dapper, we not only help our clients to grow but ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. We get the job done and celebrate afterwards.

 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies

 - Meal vouchers

 - Health Insurance coverage

 - 26 days of paid leave

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - Receive training from the leading B2B Marketing experts

 - Complimentary Macbook

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team

 - Annual trip to the Rotterdam office

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - Team activities throughout the year

 - You’re welcomed into a positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key
   
   

Who are we?

Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam with a second office in Lisbon. Since 2019, we’ve been redefining what’s possible in B2B marketing.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards https://europeanagencyawards.com/2025-winners/. It’s our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next ten years.

We’re home to 65 passionate marketers with a wide range of expertise: performance specialists, content marketers, designers, and more. We represent over 21 nationalities, which helps us serve B2B businesses worldwide.

We prioritize growth, both on a company and personal level. Join Dapper if you want to fast-track your development and work at the forefront of B2B Marketing.



We work by our values:

1. We Peak Perform: We are always on the top of our game, and are passionate about what we do.

2. We Pioneer: We are innovators at heart. We come first while others follow and drive change.

3. We don't work, we Play: We

Dapper is looking for a Content Marketer with a pioneering spirit. You’ll play a key role in helping our clients drive online growth, from strategy to execution. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Senior Demand Generation Manager?

Dapper is looking for a Senior Demand Generation Manager with a pioneering spirit - someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency worldwide.

As a Senior Demand Generation Manager, you’ll play a key role in helping our clients drive online growth, from strategy to execution. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful. Thanks to our vision and ambition, Dapper has grown to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency in the Netherlands within just five years. Its our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next 10 years.



This job is for you if you:

 - Have 5+ years of relevant experience, ideally in a B2B context, fast scaling, or agency environment

 - You bring a growth mindset, open to feedback, focused on learning, and always looking for ways to improve and support others in doing the same.

 - Bring a strategic mindset, but still enjoy jumping into the details, whether it’s sparring with your client on attribution models, reviewing performance campaigns or challenging content creation.

 - Take full ownership of your projects, challenging the brief, aligning with clients, and pushing for better outcomes through collaboration with the team

 - Are confident owning and leading client relationships, from onboarding and strategy to reviews and roadmap planning

source_jobs.title: Digital Marketing Intern
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Digital Marketing Intern?

Do you want to develop an online B2B marketer mindset? Do you want to explore the world of digital marketing? Then this might be the position you are looking for.

You will make a difference

As a Digital Marketing intern, you are a hands-on part of the team helping clients realize digital growth. For who might you do this? Think big and wide, we work with a range of businesses, including promising start-ups, midsized companies, and beyond - such as Logitech or TOPdesk.

As a Digital Marketing Intern, you get to learn about the journey from start to finish - whether you are writing copy for a LinkedIn campaign or launching a Google Ads campaign. In collaboration with your manager, you will determine whether you join the performance or content marketing team. At the end of the internship, you’ll be ready for your first full-time job in marketing!

No, we won’t let you do this alone. You will be joining a team of motivated marketers who are keen to go the extra mile to become the best B2B marketing agency in Europe. If you, like us, dare to dream big, Dapper is the place for you.

Reasons why this job is for you

 - You are currently registered as a student and will be for the duration of the internship.

 - You have strong written and verbal communication skills in Dutch and English!

 - Your are based in the Netherlands

 - You are available full-time for 5 - 6 months

 - You feel comfortable giving advice to companies

 - You have a great set of social skills

 - You have a strong drive and a proactive mindset

 - You know how to have fun

A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

Together, we will help our clients grow and ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. Once we've done that, it's time to celebrate together!

 - Learn how to consult fast-growing start-ups

 - Receive training from the leading growth experts

 - Learn to think like a B2B Marketer

 - Freedom to come up with ideas and execute them

 - Travel costs covered

 - Opportunity to grow familiar with various marketing tools

 - Monthly reimbursement of €800, based on full time working hours

 - Complimentary Dapper work vacation with the team every year

 - Central office next to Rotterdam Central Station

 - Free breakfast & lunch at the office

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - Team activities throughout the year

Who are we?

Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam with a second office in Lisbon. Since 2019, we’ve been redefining what’s possible in B2B marketing.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards https://europeanagencyawards.com/2025-winners/. It’s our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next ten years.

We’re home to 65 passionate marketers with a wide range of expertise: performance specialists, content marketers, designers, and more. We represent over 21 nationalities, which helps us serve B2B businesses worldwide.

We prioritize growth, both on a company and personal level. Join Dapper if you want to fast-track your development and work at the forefront of B2B Marketing.

Ready? Set? Go!

Are you ready and excited to join us after reading this all? If you think we’re the right fit for you, please leave info here and who knows… See you soon!

source_jobs.title: Creative Design Intern
source_jobs.description:
Are you an enthusiastic and driven designer? Then we’re looking for you!

Dapper is looking for an eager Creative Design Intern to join our young and passionate team.

As a Creative Design Intern, you are a hands-on part of the team helping clients realize digital growth. For who you might do this? Think big and wide, we work with a range of businesses, including promising start-ups, midsized companies, and beyond, such as Port of Rotterdam or Fox IT.



Responsibilities:

 - Collaborate with other designers, marketing professionals, and stakeholders to ensure the successful completion of projects

 - Assist with the design of marketing materials, including graphics, video content, and social media assets

 - Support with video editing and post-production tasks

 - Help create and maintain a cohesive visual identity for our clients

 - Assist with filming and photography if needed



Requirements:

 - You are currently registered as a student and will be for the duration of the internship

 - You are based in the Netherlands

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

 - Strong graphic design skills and experience with Adobe Creative Suite

 - Familiarity with video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro

 - Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment



We are looking for someone who:

At Dapper, we value both skills and personality. You’ll thrive in our team if you…

 - Love storytelling through design and have a passion for marketing

 - Are proactive and eager to learn and grow

 - Enjoy collaborating but can also take ownership of projects

 - Believe that teamwork is key—and know how to have fun while working hard



Why work at Dapper?

At Dapper, we don’t just help our clients grow—we ensure our team members grow too. You’ll get:

 - Freedom to bring your creative ideas to life

 - A monthly allowance of €800

 - Hands-on experience working on real projects for startups and Fortune 500 clients

 - Complimentary Dapper work vacation with the team every year

 - An office next to Rotterdam Central Station

 - Complimentary breakfast and lunch

 - Covered transportation costs

 - Access to gym & wellness facilities

 - Complementary McBook and all necessary accessories

 - Team activities throughout the year



How to apply

Think you’re the right fit? Leave your info here, and don’t forget to include a link to your portfolio. We can’t wait to see your work—and who knows… See you soon!

source_jobs.title: Videographer & Video Editor
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Videographer?



Dapper is looking for a Videographer & Video Editor with a sharp eye and a pioneering spirit. Someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency in the world.

As a Videographer & Video Editor on our creative team, you’ll play a key role in turning ideas into visual stories, and your work will help bring our clients' brands to life across digital channels. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a creative revolution. Our mission is to make B2B less boring, more creative and more impactful, with visuals that are impossible to ignore.



This job is for you if you:

 - Have 4+ years of relevant experience producing and editing, ideally in an agency, production company, or marketing team, with a strong portfolio showcasing your ability to create high-quality video content.

 - You’re proficient with Adobe Premiere Pro, and comfortable using After Effects and DaVinci Resolve (or similar tools) for motion integration and colour correction

 - You can confidently manage projects independently, from brief to filming and editing, while sticking to deadlines and maintaining brand quality

 - You have solid experience using DSLR or mirrorless cameras, basic lighting setups, and audio gear. You know how to capture professional footage and adapt well when filming on location

 - You’re comfortable going on solo client shoots, including setting up equipment, managing time efficiently, and capturing the right shots to tell the story

 - You’re able to give and receive feedback constructively and enjoy collaborating with creatives, marketers, and account managers

 - You’re curious and always looking for smarter ways to work: through AI tools, automation or templates

 - You’re adaptable and open to change: comfortable adjusting to new tools, workflows, team structures, and creative challenges in a fast-evolving company environment. You see change as an opportunity to grow, not a obstacle.



What we value in everyone at Dapper Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:



 - You communicate clearly and proactively in English and Dutch, whether it’s with teammates, clients, or through your work, you keep things sharp, structured, and on point.

 - You are currently based in the Netherlands.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change, you adapt without losing momentum, and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact, you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity, you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.



A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

At Dapper, we not only help our clients to grow but ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. We get the job done and celebrate afterwards.



 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies

 - Receive training from the leading B2B Marketing experts

 - 30 vacation days per year

 - Participation in our retirement plan (plus a 5% monthly contribution on top of your salary at Nationale Nederlanden)

 - 8% holiday allowance

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - Complimentary breakfast and lunch

 - Travel costs covered

 - We will provide you with a Macbook and all the tools you need

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team

 - Office next to Rotterdam Central station

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - Team activities throughout the year

 - You’re welcomed into a positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key



Who are we?

Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam

source_jobs.title: Video Editor Intern
source_jobs.description:
Are you an enthusiastic and driven Video Editor Intern? Then we’re looking for you!



Dapper is looking for a Video Editor Intern to join our young and passionate team. In this role, you’ll work closely with our in-house videographer and growth marketing team to assist with shoots, edit high-quality videos, and contribute to compelling visual storytelling for our clients.



Responsibilities:

 - Assist in planning, setting up, and executing video shoots

 - Support with video editing and post-production tasks

 - Help create and maintain a cohesive visual identity for both clients and Dapper

 - Collaborate with the creative team to develop engaging video concepts

 - Handle basic photography tasks when needed

 - Ensure all video content aligns with marketing goals and brand guidelines



Requirements:

 - Strong skills in videography and video editing

 - Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro (or similar editing software)

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in English (Dutch is a plus!)

 - Familiarity with camera equipment, lighting, and sound recording

 - Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment

 - You are currently registered as a student and will be for the duration of the internship.

 - You are based in the Netherlands.



We are looking for someone who:

At Dapper, we value both skills and personality. You’ll thrive in our team if you…

 - Love storytelling through video and have a passion for marketing

 - Are proactive and eager to learn and grow

 - Enjoy collaborating but can also take ownership of projects

 - Believe that teamwork is key—and know how to have fun while working hard
   
   

Who we are

At Dapper we work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond. We believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards https://europeanagencyawards.com/2025-winners/. It’s our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next ten years.



Why work at Dapper?

At Dapper, we don’t just help our clients grow—we ensure our team members grow too. You’ll get:

 - Freedom to bring your creative ideas to life

 - Hands-on experience working on real projects for startups and Fortune 500 clients

 - A monthly allowance of €800

 - Complimentary Dapper work vacation with the team every year

 - An office next to Rotterdam Central Station

 - Complimentary breakfast and lunch

 - Covered transportation costs

 - Access to gym & wellness facilities

 - Complementary McBook and all necessary accessories

 - Team activities throughout the year



How to apply

Think you’re the right fit? Leave your info here, and don’t forget to include a link to your portfolio. We can’t wait to see your work—and who knows… See you soon!

source_jobs.title: Graphic Designer
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Graphic Designer?

Dapper is looking for a Graphic Designer with a sharp eye and a pioneering spirit. Someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency in the world.

As a Graphic Designer on our creative team, you’ll play a key role in turning ideas into visual stories, and your work will help bring our clients' brands to life across digital channels. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a creative revolution. Our mission is to make B2B less boring, more creative and more impactful, with visuals that are impossible to ignore.



This job is for you if you:

 - Have 2+ years of relevant experience, ideally in a B2B context, fast scaling, or agency environment, with a strong portfolio showcasing your designs

 - You know your way around the Adobe Creative Suite, especially Illustrator and inDesign.

 - You can work on design tasks with a strong eye for detail and consistency

 - You’re open to feedback and able to work collaboratively with designers, copywriters, project managers and marketers

 - You understand design principles (composition, typography, color, layout) and are able to create aesthetic and on-brand visuals for various formats

 - You are organized, able to manage your time across multiple projects, and meet deadlines with minimal supervision. You are able to work independently across the full creative process, from concept and ideation to execution and final delivery

 - Don’t just execute, you ask “why” behind the brief and push for better outcomes

 - Take ownership of projects while still collaborating effectively with your team and clients.

 - You’re curious about implementing AI tools and workflows (Firefly, Midjourney, or AI-assisted editing/compositing) to improve speed, creativity, and productivity
   
   

 - Bonus:
   
   - You have experience working with After Effects
   
   - You have UX/UI experience
   
   - You are familiar with Figma



What we value in everyone at Dapper

Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:

 - You communicate clearly and proactively in English, whether it’s with teammates, clients, or through your work, you keep things sharp, structured, and on point.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change, you adapt without losing momentum, and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact, you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity, you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.

A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies

 - Meal vouchers

 - Health Insurance coverage

 - 26 days of paid leave

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - Endless growth, learning, and development opportunities and new ideas are always welcome

 - We will provide you with a Macbook, and the necessary accessories

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - You’re welcomed into a positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key



Who are we?

Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam with a second office in Lisbon. Since 2019, we’ve been redefining what’s possible in B2B marketing.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards https://europeanagencyawards.com/2025-winners/. It’s our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next ten years.

We’re home to 65 passionate marketers with a wide range of expertise

source_jobs.title: Open Application
source_jobs.description:
Open Application

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful. We work with ambitious B2B brands that want to stand out, grow faster, and challenge the status quo.

We’re always excited to meet curious, ambitious, and talented people who want to push boundaries in B2B marketing. Even if there’s no specific vacancy that fits your profile right now, we’d still love to hear from you.

If you’re passionate about marketing, creativity, growth, or building something meaningful with a high-energy team, this might be the start of something great.




WHAT WE VALUE IN EVERYONE AT DAPPER

Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:

 - You communicate clearly and proactively in English or Dutch. Whether it’s with teammates, clients, or through your work, you keep things sharp, structured, and on point.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change. You adapt without losing momentum and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact. You take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity. You enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.

 - You are based in the Netherlands or Lisbon.
   
   


WHY YOU MIGHT ENJOY WORKING WITH US

 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies.

 - Endless growth, learning, and development opportunities — new ideas are always welcome.

 - We’ll provide you with a MacBook and the necessary accessories.

 - A complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team.

 - A positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key.
   
   


WHO ARE WE?

Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam with a second office in Lisbon. Since 2019, we’ve been redefining what’s possible in B2B marketing.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards https://europeanagencyawards.com/2025-winners/. Our ambition is clear: to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide within the next ten years.

Today, we’re home to 65 passionate marketers with a wide range of expertise: performance specialists, content marketers, designers, strategists, and more. Our team represents over 21 nationalities, allowing us to serve B2B businesses across the globe.

At Dapper, we prioritize growth — both as a company and on a personal level. Join us if you want to fast-track your development and work at the forefront of B2B marketing.




WE WORK BY OUR VALUES

1. We Peak Perform
We are always at the top of our game and passionate about what we do.

2. We Pioneer
We are innovators at heart. We lead while others follow and drive change.

3. We Don’t Work, We Play
We enjoy the adventure that we’re on together.


READY? SET? GO!

Are you ready to take the next step with us?

Leave your information and tell us a bit about yourself — we’re always happy to connect with talented people who want to shape the future of B2B marketing.

And who knows… see you soon! 🚀

source_jobs.title: Sales Manager
source_jobs.description:
ARE YOU OUR NEW SALES MANAGER?

Dapper is looking for a Sales Manager. Someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency worldwide.

You'll work directly with the CEO and two other salespeople to convert inbound leads from our marketing into partnerships.

You also actively reach out to ideal clients in the Netherlands, Western Europe and the United States.

We sell to a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe in B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful.




THIS JOB IS FOR YOU IF YOU:

 - Ideally, you have B2B marketing experience, as the job requires consultative selling. You need to understand B2B marketing because we have strategic discussions with our clients in sales conversations.

 - Ideally, you have sales experience or a talent for sales. We're looking for people who love interacting and can connect with others easily and quickly.

 - Speak Dutch and are fluent in English.

 - Have a growth mindset. You give and receive feedback, seek continuous improvement, and embrace new approaches.

 - Are extremely performance-driven with a bias toward results—we're building the #1 B2B marketing agency in the space, and we need someone who thrives on hitting and exceeding ambitious targets.

 - Thrive in a fast-paced environment.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Your main responsibilities will include:

 - Follow up on high-quality inbound leads generated by Dapper's marketing. We receive numerous qualified requests every week that need to be guided toward conversion through consultative selling.

 - Proactively reach out to companies that match our ICP (Ideal Customer Profile), expanding our presence across the Netherlands, promising markets in Western Europe, and potentially the United States.

 - Build initial strategies and proposals for potential clients to sell collaborations.

 - linkCollaborate with the broader sales team to continuously improve our sales approach.

 - BONUS: If you're interested in building a personal brand as a thought leader in B2B marketing, we'd love to hear about it. Check out Steven's LinkedIn profile https://www.linkedin.com/in/steven-van-marle-19039a242/ to see the kind of personal branding we encourage and support. We dedicate time and resources to building a personal brand.




WHAT WE VALUE IN EVERYONE AT DAPPER

Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, we look for these qualities in every team member:

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change; you adapt without losing momentum and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact; you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity; you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.




A LIST OF REASONS WHY YOU MIGHT ENJOY WORKING WITH US:

At Dapper, we not only help our clients to grow, we ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. We get the job done and celebrate afterward.

 - You get the chance to build your personal brand on LinkedIn.

 - 30 vacation days per year

 - Participation in our retirement plan (plus a 5% monthly contribution on top of your salary at Nationale Nederlanden)

 - 8% holiday allowance

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - We offer a salary and a bonus system based on your performance.

 - You get the chance to work directly with the CEO on the growth of the company.

 - Competitive bonus system—your commercial success directly translates to financial reward.

 - Office next to Rotterdam Central Station with excellent accessibility.

 - Healthy breakfast and lunch provided daily.

 - Travel costs covered.

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation

source_jobs.title: Junior Performance Marketer (NL)
source_jobs.description:
Are you our new Junior Performance Marketer?

Dapper is looking for a Junior Performance Marketer with a pioneering spirit - someone ambitious enough to help us build the #1 B2B marketing agency worldwide.

As a Junior Performance Marketer, you’ll play a key role in helping our clients drive online growth, from strategy to execution. We work with a diverse range of B2B businesses across the globe: from promising start-ups to fast-growing scale-ups, and beyond.

At Dapper, we believe B2B marketing needs a revolution. Our mission is to make B2B marketing less boring, more creative, and more impactful.


This job is for you if you:

 - Have 2 years of relevant experience, ideally in a B2B context, fast scaling, or agency environment.

 - Are eager to learn and grow in the world of B2B Performance Marketing

 - Enjoy working in a collaborative, fast-paced environment where curiosity and ambition are celebrated

 - Bring a proactive attitude and aren’t afraid to experiment, ask questions, or challenge the status quo

 - Have a bit of experience with Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads or any other Paid Ads tool

 - Are able to analyse data and can present in a clear, understandable way to others


What we value in everyone at Dapper
Dapper works as a close-knit team with different perspectives, but the same energy to push boundaries and raise the bar. Regardless of your role, there are a few qualities we look for in every team member:

 - You communicate clearly and proactively in Dutch and English, whether it’s with teammates, clients, or through your work, you keep things sharp, structured, and on point.

 - You are flexible and stay focused when things change, you adapt without losing momentum, and find smart ways to move forward.

 - You want to grow and make an impact, you take ownership, welcome feedback, and push yourself (and others) to raise the bar.

 - You bring positive energy and curiosity, you enjoy solving problems, testing ideas, and collaborating with people who care about what they do.



A list of reasons why you might enjoy working with us:

At Dapper, we not only help our clients to grow but ensure that we are always committed to advancing ourselves. We get the job done and celebrate afterwards.

 - Consult fast-growing B2B companies

 - Receive training from the leading B2B Marketing experts

 - 30 vacation days per year

 - Participation in our retirement plan (plus a 5% monthly contribution on top of your salary at Nationale Nederlanden)

 - 8% holiday allowance

 - 10 additional unpaid leave days

 - Complimentary breakfast and lunch

 - Travel costs covered

 - Complimentary Macbook

 - Complimentary annual Dapper work vacation with the team

 - Office next to Rotterdam Central station

 - Gym and wellness facility membership

 - Team activities throughout the year

 - You’re welcomed into a positive work environment where freedom, teamwork, and respect are key



Who are we?
Dapper is a fast-growing B2B marketing agency, headquartered in Rotterdam with a second office in Lisbon. Since 2019, we’ve been redefining what’s possible in B2B marketing.

Thanks to our vision and ambition, within six years Dapper has grown to become B2B Agency of the Year (2025) according to the European Agency Awards. It’s our ambition to become the #1 B2B Marketing Agency worldwide in the next ten years.

We’re home to 65 passionate marketers with a wide range of expertise: performance specialists, content marketers, designers, and more. We represent over 21 nationalities, which helps us serve B2B businesses worldwide.

We prioritize growth, both on a company and personal level. Join Dapper if you want to fast-track your development and work at the forefront of B2B Marketing.

We work by our values:

 1. We Peak Perform: We are always on the top of our game, and are passionate about what we do.

 2. We Pioneer: We are innovators at heart. We come first while others follow and drive change.
